PowerShell($env:BROWSER="none"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless=true","--server.port=8765","--browser.gatherUsageStats=false" -RedirectStandardOutput "_st_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_st_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "started")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($r.Content\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "no health yet" })

PowerShell(python -m py_compile app.py model.py; if \($?\) { Write-Output "compile OK" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "server health: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "server down" })

PowerShell($env:BROWSER="none"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless=true","--server.port=8768","--browser.gatherUsageStats=false" -RedirectStandardOutput "_st4_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_st4_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8768/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; Write-Output \("health: " + $ok\); $err = Get-Content _st4_err.log -Raw; if \($err -and $err.Trim\(\).Length -gt 0\) { Write-Output "ERR LOG:"; Write-Output $err } else { Write-Output "no errors in log" })
PowerShell(python test_live_api.py)
PowerShell(python test_live_api.py 2>&1 | Select-Object -Skip 0 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("exit code: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))

PowerShell($env:DRONE_STATE_PATH="$env:TEMP\\drone_live_demo_state.json"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","api:app","--host","127.0.0.1","--port","8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "_uv_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_uv_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; Write-Output \("local api up: " + $ok\))
PowerShell(python test_live_api.py http://127.0.0.1:8000 2>&1 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("exit code: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))

PowerShell($env:PORT="8010"; $env:DRONE_STATE_PATH="$env:TEMP\\drone_render_sim.json"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","api:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","$env:PORT" -RedirectStandardOutput "_rn_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_rn_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8010/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; Write-Output \("render-style start \(PORT=8010\) up: " + $ok\))
PowerShell(python test_live_api.py http://127.0.0.1:8010 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 9 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("exit code: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8010/state" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("content-type: " + $r.Headers['Content-Type']\); Write-Output \("seq: " + $j.seq\); Write-Output \("telemetry livestock count: " + $j.telemetry.livestock.Count\); Write-Output \("stored waypoints: " + $j.waypoints.Count\))

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== full loop test \(test_live_api.py\) ==="; python test_live_api.py http://127.0.0.1:8011 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("test exit: " + $LASTEXITCODE\); Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== keep_warm.py \(resolves $env:GROUND_CONTROL_API_URL, single ping\) ==="; python keep_warm.py --once 2>&1 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("keep_warm exit: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))
PowerShell(Stop-Process *)

PowerShell($env:PORT="8012"; $env:DRONE_STATE_PATH="$env:TEMP\\drone_upg.json"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","api:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8012" -RedirectStandardOutput "_u_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_u_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8012/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; Write-Output \("API up: " + $ok\); Write-Output "--- full loop test ---"; python test_live_api.py http://127.0.0.1:8012 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 7 | Out-String | Write-Output; Write-Output \("loop exit: " + $LASTEXITCODE\))
